short: The largest and most capable tier of Google DeepMind's Gemini model family.
definition: Gemini Ultra is the largest and most capable tier of Google DeepMind's Gemini family, built for highly complex multimodal reasoning, coding, science, and long-context tasks. It is Google's frontier capability offering, competing with the top models from other major labs, and is typically accessed through a premium subscription. Successive Gemini generations have continued to iterate on the Ultra tier.
